events.title: Brian May turns 69

events.title: MTV launched 47 years ago
events.blurb: MTV first hit the airwaves in 1981, with the Buggles' Video Killed The Radio Star as its first video

angles.name: music tv revolution
angles.copy: It's been 47 years since MTV changed the music landscape with its launch, and who can forget that first iconic video, Video Killed The Radio Star by the Buggles

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe 32 years ago

angles.name: britpop classic

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago

angles.name: peace and music

events.title: Elvis Presley died 49 years ago
